name: Sandra Wilson
text: We love this place! This is my wife and I second time at a resort but our  first time at Cove Have together. This was our Mother’s Day gift to ourselves. It has  been awhile we must admit  for the both of us. We always talked about coming together to create memories of our love. The Poconos is still a great place for couples sadly there weren’t many couples present notably a major decrease from what we remember. The room at Cove Haven mirrors the room I visited 21 years ago so they need updating to say the least. The rooms were in fair condition dusty and wear n tear is  visible. The deer population caught us off guard not use to them approaching people. But despite the cosmetics we had an amazing time. We won the pot at bingo the first night and took pleasure in having our own pool and champagne hot tub. It was so refreshing and relaxing to be able to rediscover each other and enjoy us with no distractions. The presentation was excellent and there weee a variety of food selections and the service was great!! The second day we enjoyed the spa service with a massage and we both fell asleep it was relaxing. We plan to go to the night club tonight and dance even if we are only dancing. This year we will celebrate our 5th anniversary and we will definitely comeback to the Poconos maybe Paradise Stream next Mother’s Day.
textTranslated: Kami sangat menyukai tempat ini! Ini adalah kali kedua saya dan istri saya menginap di resor, tetapi pertama kalinya kami bersama di Cove Haven. Ini adalah hadiah Hari Ibu untuk diri kami sendiri. Sudah cukup lama, harus kami akui, bagi kami berdua. Kami selalu membicarakan tentang datang bersama untuk menciptakan kenangan indah tentang cinta kami. Poconos masih merupakan tempat yang bagus untuk pasangan, sayangnya tidak banyak pasangan yang hadir, terlihat penurunan yang signifikan dari yang kami ingat. Kamar di Cove Haven mirip dengan kamar yang saya kunjungi 21 tahun yang lalu, jadi mereka perlu memperbaruinya. Kamar-kamar dalam kondisi cukup baik, berdebu dan terlihat bekas pemakaian. Populasi rusa membuat kami terkejut karena tidak terbiasa melihat mereka mendekati orang. Tetapi terlepas dari penampilan luarnya, kami bersenang-senang. Kami memenangkan hadiah bingo di malam pertama dan menikmati kolam renang pribadi dan jacuzzi sampanye. Sangat menyegarkan dan menenangkan untuk dapat menemukan kembali satu sama lain dan menikmati kebersamaan tanpa gangguan. Penyajiannya sangat baik dan ada berbagai pilihan makanan, serta pelayanannya luar biasa!! Di hari kedua, kami menikmati layanan spa dengan pijat dan kami berdua tertidur, sangat menenangkan. Kami berencana pergi ke klub malam malam ini dan berdansa, meskipun hanya berdansa saja. Tahun ini kami akan merayakan ulang tahun pernikahan ke-5 dan kami pasti akan kembali ke Poconos, mungkin Paradise Stream pada Hari Ibu tahun depan.
responseFromOwnerText:

Your review is like music to our ears, and we're thrilled that you chose Cove Haven as the setting to create beautiful memories! It sounds like you and your wife had a wonderful Mother’s Day celebration. Rediscovering love is a beautiful journey, and we're happy to be part of it. Winning at bingo and enjoying your private amenities sounds like a jackpot of fun and relaxation!

We are sorry to hear about the room conditions. We're currently working on upgrading our facilities to provide even more lovely experiences for guests like you. The deer are indeed friendly but note that we aim to maintain a harmonious coexistence.

Have a fantastic time at the nightclub tonight - may the dance floor be your stage of love! Let's make next Mother's Day even more enchanting.

Sincerely,

Romance Concierge

name: Cinthia Egusquiza
text:
I booked a one-night stay at Cove Haven Resort from May 2–3, expecting a romantic getaway, but it turned into a very disappointing experience.

From the moment we arrived, the property felt extremely outdated—from the front desk to the rooms. The carpets looked old, dirty, and had a musty smell. Unfortunately, the air quality in the room made things worse. I suffer from seasonal allergies, and the lack of proper ventilation triggered them almost immediately. It was so uncomfortable that I couldn’t even consider sleeping there.

I called the front desk to request a non-carpeted room and explained my allergies, but there was no help or accommodation offered.

What was supposed to be a special night quickly turned into a nightmare. We ended up leaving and booking another place by the lake that was much cleaner, more comfortable, and surprisingly half the price.

I would strongly recommend avoiding this resort if you have allergies or are sensitive to smells and outdated conditions.
textTranslated:
Saya memesan penginapan satu malam di Cove Haven Resort dari tanggal 2-3 Mei, mengharapkan liburan romantis, tetapi ternyata menjadi pengalaman yang sangat mengecewakan.

Sejak saat kami tiba, properti tersebut terasa sangat ketinggalan zaman—dari meja resepsionis hingga kamar-kamarnya. Karpetnya terlihat tua, kotor, dan berbau apak. Sayangnya, kualitas udara di kamar memperburuk keadaan. Saya menderita alergi musiman, dan kurangnya ventilasi yang memadai memicu alergi saya hampir seketika. Sangat tidak nyaman sehingga saya bahkan tidak bisa mempertimbangkan untuk tidur di sana.

Saya menelepon resepsionis untuk meminta kamar tanpa karpet dan menjelaskan alergi saya, tetapi tidak ada bantuan atau akomodasi yang ditawarkan.

Apa yang seharusnya menjadi malam yang istimewa dengan cepat berubah menjadi mimpi buruk. Kami akhirnya pergi dan memesan tempat lain di tepi danau yang jauh lebih bersih, lebih nyaman, dan yang mengejutkan, harganya setengahnya.

Saya sangat menyarankan untuk menghindari resor ini jika Anda memiliki alergi atau sensitif terhadap bau dan kondisi yang ketinggalan zaman.
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Cinthia Egusquiza,

I'm truly sorry to hear about your recent experience at Cove Haven Resort. Your expectations for a romantic getaway were not met, and I empathize with the discomfort you felt during your stay. Our guests’ comfort is incredibly important, and I regret that we were unable to accommodate your allergy needs with a suitable room.

We are currently evaluating our facilities, including plans to update ventilation and room environments to enhance guest comfort. Your feedback is invaluable, and rest assured, we will make the necessary improvements.

We hope for the opportunity to provide a more pleasant experience if you choose to visit us again in the future.

Sincerely,

Romance Concierge
title: Cove Haven Resort
target_name: Cozy Haven with Jacuzzi, Rooftop

name: Teddy's Reviews
text: Not to fond of the fact you have to leave your room to go eat but other than that it was beautiful in every way. As a place that's meant to be a couples getaway it just requires you to leave the room and interact with other couples a little to much. Would love an in room eating option and at least a microwave for those times when you and your significant other just want that time with each other. If you miss your time to eat you're forced to eat from their other little spot which isn't bad but offers very little options. Also it kinda sucks that it doesn't allow deliveries from off-site places. But other than that it's really gorgeous, love the room options, love the amenities offered, they even have a couples spa. And I'm a big fan of nature so for it to be such an open air place with dear that'll literally walk up to your door is beautiful. Just make sure you get a pool room because the little heart jacuzzi that is in the room isn't big enough for a couple at all, it's more of a glorified sink if anything. But that pool and in room sauna definitely made up for it especially since the pool is heated.
textTranslated: Saya kurang suka kenyataan bahwa Anda harus keluar kamar untuk makan, tetapi selain itu, tempat ini indah dalam segala hal. Sebagai tempat yang dimaksudkan untuk liburan pasangan, tempat ini mengharuskan Anda untuk keluar kamar dan berinteraksi dengan pasangan lain terlalu sering. Saya berharap ada pilihan makan di dalam kamar dan setidaknya microwave untuk saat-saat ketika Anda dan pasangan hanya ingin menghabiskan waktu berdua. Jika Anda melewatkan waktu makan Anda, Anda terpaksa makan di tempat kecil mereka yang lain, yang tidak buruk tetapi menawarkan pilihan yang sangat sedikit. Selain itu, agak mengecewakan bahwa mereka tidak mengizinkan pengiriman dari tempat di luar lokasi. Tetapi selain itu, tempat ini benar-benar cantik, saya suka pilihan kamarnya, saya suka fasilitas yang ditawarkan, mereka bahkan memiliki spa untuk pasangan. Dan saya penggemar berat alam, jadi tempat terbuka dengan rusa yang benar-benar akan berjalan ke pintu Anda sangat indah. Pastikan Anda mendapatkan kamar dengan kolam renang karena jacuzzi kecil berbentuk hati di kamar tidak cukup besar untuk pasangan sama sekali, lebih seperti wastafel yang diperbesar. Namun, kolam renang dan sauna di dalam kamar benar-benar menebus kekurangan tersebut, terutama karena kolam renangnya dipanaskan.
responseFromOwnerText:

Thank you for your five-star rating! We are thrilled you enjoyed your overall stay, and we hope you'll come back and see us at Cove Haven Resort!

Warm Regards,

Cove Haven Management Team

Dear Mike Chel,

We hear your concerns about our pricing and understand how important it is for guests of all ages to have a wonderful stay. It seems we may have missed the mark with our activities for younger guests, and we are committed to expanding and diversifying our offerings to ensure everyone finds joy and excitement during their visit. In addition, we're aware that the nostalgia of our decor does not resonate with everyone, and we're actively exploring updates to give our resort a fresh, contemporary feel. Regarding our dining experience, your input on the dinner portions is valuable, and we're assessing our menu to ensure it meets our guests' expectations. Your feedback helps us grow, and we are determined to make your next experience with us more delightful, where love is always in the air and just right.

Sincerely,

name: Jessica Barnett
text:
The Uptown Cosy Haven was a perfect apartment for our long weekend in NYC. We had great communication with the host during our stay and the instructions were very clear for accessing our keys and getting up to the fifth floor. The apartment itself was very quiet, but like any city, you could hear a good amount of noise from the fast food restaurant across the street and some traffic during the night. The neighborhood was much quieter than other parts of the city tho! We just turned on some white noise and had no problem falling asleep in the comfortable master bedroom each night. The bed in the second bedroom is much firmer and definitely not something I could’ve slept in, but our daughter had no issues. Having two full size bathrooms was great and the shower had plenty of hot water and water pressure. We didn’t cook and only ate some take out one time at the apartment, but the kitchen had everything we might need. We walked to and from the subway most days and had no trouble getting around the city from this apartment.

The only two recommendations I have for the host would be to fix the master bathroom door (it closed, but the hinges need to be tightened) and consider a mattress topper for the second bedroom. Other than that, it was a perfect stay!
textTranslated:
Apartemen Uptown Cosy Haven adalah pilihan sempurna untuk liburan akhir pekan panjang kami di NYC. Kami berkomunikasi dengan baik dengan pemilik selama menginap dan petunjuk untuk mengakses kunci dan naik ke lantai lima sangat jelas. Apartemen itu sendiri sangat tenang, tetapi seperti kota mana pun, Anda dapat mendengar cukup banyak suara dari restoran cepat saji di seberang jalan dan beberapa lalu lintas di malam hari. Namun, lingkungan sekitarnya jauh lebih tenang daripada bagian kota lainnya! Kami hanya menyalakan suara latar dan tidak kesulitan tertidur di kamar tidur utama yang nyaman setiap malam. Kasur di kamar tidur kedua jauh lebih keras dan jelas bukan sesuatu yang bisa saya tiduri, tetapi putri kami tidak mengalami masalah. Memiliki dua kamar mandi berukuran penuh sangat bagus dan pancuran memiliki banyak air panas dan tekanan air. Kami tidak memasak dan hanya makan makanan siap saji satu kali di apartemen, tetapi dapur memiliki semua yang mungkin kami butuhkan. Kami berjalan kaki ke dan dari kereta bawah tanah hampir setiap hari dan tidak kesulitan berkeliling kota dari apartemen ini.

Satu-satunya dua rekomendasi saya untuk tuan rumah adalah memperbaiki pintu kamar mandi utama (pintunya bisa ditutup, tetapi engselnya perlu dikencangkan) dan mempertimbangkan untuk menambahkan alas kasur tambahan untuk kamar tidur kedua. Selain itu, pengalaman menginap saya sempurna!
